title: Starbucks India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Starbucks India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
